final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original traditional Chinese ink wash painting (水墨画) depicting a serene mountain landscape with a fisherman by a stream.

Style/medium: traditional Chinese ink wash (水墨画), brush and ink on rice paper, in the spirit of Song Dynasty landscape masters such as Fan Kuan and Guo Xi — monochrome ink with subtle wash gradations, deliberate negative space (留白) as a compositional element
Composition: layered depth — distant mountains recede into mist in the upper register, mid-ground of drifting clouds and fog, foreground anchored by pine trees and a thatched cottage beside a stream; vertical scroll proportion, asymmetric balance with generous empty sky
Subject: an elderly scholar-fisherman seated quietly on a mossy rock at the stream's edge, fishing rod extended over still water; gnarled pine trees with expressive brushwork; a humble thatched-roof cottage nestled among rocks
Scene/backdrop: remote mountain wilderness, mist-shrouded peaks fading to near-white in the distance, a winding stream in the foreground, no human infrastructure beyond the single cottage
Lighting/mood: diffuse ambient light suggesting early morning or dusk, atmosphere of stillness and solitude (空灵悠远), Eastern aesthetic of emptiness and contemplation
Color palette: near-monochrome — deep ink black for foreground pine and rocks, mid-tone grey washes for middle-ground foliage and cottage, pale diluted ink fading to white for distant mountains and sky; no saturated color
Materials/textures: visible dry-brush strokes (飞白) on pine bark and rock surfaces, wet ink pooling for dark foliage masses, soft wet-on-wet washes for mist and distant peaks, rice paper texture implied
Constraints: negative space (留白) must occupy at least one-third of the composition; no photorealistic rendering — must read as hand-brushed ink work; no Western perspective grid, use atmospheric recession through ink dilution only
Avoid: watercolor Western style, digital airbrush gradients, vivid color, photorealism, symmetrical composition, crowded composition with no breathing room
